ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the presidential election */,
  "incumbent_candidate" TEXT /* Name of the incumbent party candidate */,
  "other_candidate" TEXT /* Name of the other candidate */,
  "average_income_growth" REAL /* Average recent growth in personal incomes (percentage) */,
  "military_fatalities" INTEGER /* US military fatalities per million population */,
  "incumbent_vote_share" REAL /* Incumbent party's vote share (percentage) */,
  "incumbent_party" TEXT /* Political party of the incumbent */,
  "other_party" TEXT /* Political party of the other candidate */,
  "incumbent_win" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the incumbent won */,
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to voter_turnout table */,
  "economic_indicator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to economic_indicators table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_economic_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("economic_indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_turnout_id FOREIGN KEY ("turnout_id") REFERENCES voter_turnout ("turnout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Political party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election they participated in */,
  "candidate_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the candidate */,
  "candidate_age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate during the election */,
  "previous_elections" TEXT /* List of previous elections the candidate has participated in */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to elections table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year corresponding to the economic indicators */,
  "avg_income_growth" REAL /* Average recent growth in personal incomes (percentage) */,
  "military_fatalities" INTEGER /* US military fatalities per million population */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the year */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the year */,
  "gdp_growth" REAL /* GDP growth for the year */,
  "public_debt" REAL /* Public debt as a percentage of GDP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter turnout record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who participated */,
  "percentage_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of eligible voters who turned out */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "absentee_voters" INTEGER /* Number of absentee voters */,
  "early_voters" INTEGER /* Number of early voters */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to elections table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "military_context" (
  "military_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each military context record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "military_engagement" TEXT /* Description of major military engagements */,
  "military_budget" REAL /* Military budget for the year */,
  "military_personnel" INTEGER /* Number of active military personnel */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to elections table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("military_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_military_context_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator, researcher) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Name of the incumbent party candidate
Average recent growth in personal incomes (percentage)
US military fatalities per million population
Political party of the other candidate
Political party affiliation of the candidate
Year of the election they participated in
